hero.headline: The Secret Garden
hero.subHeadline: From primeval rainforests to high-altitude soapstone carvers.

theNyotaLens.architectNote: This is the connoisseur’s play. We bridge the emerald canopy of Kakamega with the artisan heritage of the Kisii Highlands.

sensoryChapters.narrativeBody: Trekking the Guineo-Congolian rainforest in Kakamega. The air is thick, emerald, and alive with ancient sound.
Visiting the Tabaka quarries of Kisii to see master soapstone carvers transform raw earth into fluid art.
Exploring Rusinga Island on Lake Victoria. Fossil beds, private island seclusion, and the rhythm of the great lake.

pairsWellWith.reasoning: Yellow plains to emerald forests. A sensory palette swap for the experienced traveler.
